1-Handed Knot-Tying|1.comment: "This course appears to cover critical aspects of clinical reasoning, trauma management, and knot-tying techniques, all of which are essential for surgical practice."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|2.comment: "All aspects of the course are very interesting and I can attest that I gained some knowledge. Thanks."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|3.comment: "The practical demonstrations and real-world case studies made the concepts easier to understand and apply."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|4.comment: "The fact that the course was offered for people who are right handed and left handed was interesting and insightful."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|5.comment: "Crisp and accurate. The type of content that is to be advocated by attendings and consultants."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|6.comment: "You did a great job in organising this course content and the platform was wow. Keep it up."

1-Handed Knot-Tying|7.comment: "I found this course correcting my longstanding mistake of not crossing hands while doing one handed knot."

2-Handed Knot-Tying|1.comment: "One-handed knot tying is an essential skill for surgeons, especially in situations where space is limited or when one hand is needed to maintain tension. However, whether one-handed or two-handed techniques are more advantageous depends on speed and security."

2-Handed Knot-Tying|2.comment: "The demonstration and description was simple and easy to understand."

2-Handed Knot-Tying|3.comment: "The video tutorial was in great detail without any rush."

2-Handed Knot-Tying|5.comment: "The speed was quite on time and I liked the fact that everything said was transcripted."

A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|1.course: A Crash Course in Facial Fractures
A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|1.comment: "I found the systematic approach to facial trauma assessment and management particularly valuable, especially the integration of anatomy, mechanism of injury, and surgical planning. The case-based discussions were especially enriching."

A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|2.course: A Crash Course in Facial Fractures
A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|2.comment: "This course offered a comprehensive yet systematic look at facial anatomy, fracture classification, and evidence-based management. The case-based approach clearly connected clinical findings with imaging, and the focus on interdisciplinary trauma care made it both intellectually engaging and clinically relevant.”

A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|3.course: A Crash Course in Facial Fractures
A Crash Course in Facial Fractures|3.comment: "Explaining procedures from real patient images made the topic much more understandable. Even though I am not a plastic surgery specialist and unfamiliar with these techniques, I could easily learn how to approach a trauma patient."

Acide Tranexamique|1.comment: "J'ai particulièrement apprécié la clarté des explications sur le mécanisme d'action de l'acide tranexamique, les applications cliniques concrètes en traumatologie, obstétrique et chirurgie orthopédique, ainsi que les recommandations internationales. Le format interactif et structuré, avec des points-clés, un quiz final et la possibilité de télécharger le support PDF. Ce cours m'a permis de consolider mes connaissances et de les relier directement à mes pratiques de terrain."

Acide Tranexamique|2.comment: "J'ai trouvé particulièrement intéressant l'apprentissage des techniques chirurgicales avancées et des approches utilisées dans des contextes variés, notamment la chirurgie globale. La gestion des complications post-opératoires et l'intégration de la médecine préventive m'ont aussi beaucoup marqué. Cela m'a permis d'acquérir une vision plus complète de la pratique chirurgicale."

Acide Tranexamique|3.comment: "J'ai apprécié que le quiz soit en français, permettant à ceux qui ont un niveau de base en anglais de pouvoir bien répondre."

Acute Burn Care|1.comment: "I found most interested learning about how big of an impact being in a low income environment is in the severity of burn injury outcomes."

Acute Burn Care|2.comment: "Chapter 4 is amazing. All the different cases and photos showing different presentations and different types and depths, very informative for assessing burns. Loved."

Acute Burn Care|3.comment: "Well-structured and informative, especially for practical burn management. Clear presentation of key concepts."

Acute Burn Care|4.comment: "A comprehensively clarified approach to burn patient management."

Acute Mesenteric Ischemia|1.comment: "I found the sequence of the course helpful (podcast, transcript and assessment). It helps the learner to grasp the concepts very well."

Acute Mesenteric Ischemia|2.comment: "I found the one on one interview and back and forth conversation with thorough storytelling of the case to be valuable."

Acute Mesenteric Ischemia|3.comment: "It is very interesting and you wont kow how you go deep into the topic."

Acute Mesenteric Ischemia|4.comment: "I found most interesting the management of different types of obstruction."

Acute and Chronic Pain|1.comment: "I am just simply grateful that I am able to access this course for free. There’s so much knowledge that I am gaining and will be able to use it to change my current practices as an anaesthesia provider and possibly be able to share this with others as well."

Acute and Chronic Pain|2.comment: "I enjoyed how simply she explained how spinal stimulation helps to relieve pain using the anology of blowing your hand after touching a hot oven. It was able to better understand the concept because of that."

Acute and Chronic Pain|3.comment: "It is quite an informative course. It was enlightening considering there are so many medications used for pain management. Highlighting some of them with reasons for why they are preferable chosen is an amazing guidance."

Acute and Chronic Pain|4.comment: "I liked the pyramid of chronic pain treatment modalities, most. I also highly appreciated the insight on the opioid crisis."

Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.course: Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerve Blocks
Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.comment: "This course gives me new perspective of local anelgesic use with clinical research based factors. It aids me to revive my basic knowledge."

Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.course: Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerve Blocks
Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.comment: "Thank you very much for this very course. I appreciate this."

Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.course: Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerve Blocks
Adjuvant Medications for Peripheral Nerv.comment: "This course helped me learn about many medicines and improved my professional capabilities and developed my health experiences."

All About Aseptic Technique|1.comment: "I found the course most interesting because it clearly explained how to protect key parts, the difference between general and critical aseptic fields, and why maintaining sterility is essential for patient safety. The practical examples, step-by-step procedures, and real clinical applications helped make the concepts easy to understand and apply in practice."

All About Aseptic Technique|2.comment: "The course was informative and well-structured. It helped reinforce the importance of aseptic technique in clinical practice. I appreciate the interactive quizzes and clear explanations. Thank you for the learning opportunity!"

All About Aseptic Technique|3.comment: "I found the practical applications and real-world examples most interesting. They helped me understand how the concepts can be applied effectively."

All About Aseptic Technique|4.comment: "I found the length very appropriate, and coming from New Zealand, found the slight differences in policy interesting."

All About Aseptic Technique|5.comment: "I found all aspects of this course very interesting as there were parts that I did not know about and have learnt new aspects."

All About Aseptic Technique|6.comment: "This course was engaging and to the point, I will be sending other team members to this site to do it."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|1.comment: "This course is very very important for me. I am a new learner and I learned a lot of things from this course."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|2.comment: "I found the sections on cognitive aids during crisis situations and their practical application in the operating room most interesting, as well as the parts covering anesthesia management for caesarean delivery and how to handle emergencies effectively."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|3.comment: "I have find this course very important as it demonstrates practically the best technique to use during caesarian section and how to avoid different complications due to anaesthesia practice."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|4.comment: "The most interesting aspects were the clear explanation of different anaesthetic techniques for caesarean delivery and the practical, step-by-step approach. The clinical scenarios and visual materials helped to better understand decision-making in everyday practice, especially in resource-limited settings."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|5.comment: "The discussion on post-dural puncture headache was particularly insightful, especially regarding the recommendation to prioritize phenylephrine over ephedrine in clinical practice. Overall, the entire content was highly informative and demonstrated significant relevance to my professional practice in the field of anaesthesia."

Anaesthesia for Caesarean Delivery|6.comment: "Caesarean delivery is preferred and done throughout the world, therefore it is important for this learning platform where we can access vital information online, I appreciate this."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "Overall, this course offered valuable insight into the anesthetic considerations for craniotomy and brain tumour resection. The content was clinically relevant and thoughtfully organized. I particularly appreciated the emphasis on neurophysiological stability, airway management strategies, and the importance of multidisciplinary coordination. Thank you for the opportunity to participate—this course has contributed meaningfully to my ongoing professional development in neuroanesthesia."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "Overall, the course was highly informative and well-structured. It provided a solid foundation in the principles and practical considerations of anesthesia for craniotomy. I appreciate the focus on safety, hemodynamic control, and cerebral protection. Thank you for making this valuable resource available."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "I found this course covers a really interesting intersection of physiology, pharmacology, and surgical technique all critical to optimizing neurosurgical patient care to be particularly valuable."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "I found the sequence of presentation and the classification of the indications for elective Craniotomy together with the drugs used and monitoring protocols to be particularly valuable."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "The topic is new to me. Hence it was so interesting to learn and I learned so much from the topic ."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection
Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.comment: "This course is interesting for the latest information. Furthermore it was very helpful in the aspect of clinical practice ."

Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tum.course: Anaesthesia for Craniotomy and Brain Tumour Resection

Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa.course: Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa Surgery
Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa.comment: "One of the most engaging aspects of the Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa Surgery course was the detailed focus on anaesthesia technique specific to this challenging surgical area. The content effectively highlighted the unique physiological and anatomical considerations. These elements combined to provide a clear, evidence-based understanding of how anaesthesia in this region must be tailored to minimize complications and support optimal surgical outcomes."

Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa.course: Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa Surgery
Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa.comment: "This course is most interesting for its clinical practice at any hospital/surgical institute. It's helpful from the theocratical point of view. It's concise and well summarized."

Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa.course: Anaesthesia for Posterior Cranial Fossa Surgery

Anaesthesia for Tissue Free-Flap Surgery.comment: "I enjoyed the focus on surgical safety, especially the implementation of checklists, teamwork, and communication in preventing errors, is crucial for improving patient outcomes. Additionally, the detailed discussions on microvascular reconstructive surgery, flap perfusion, and post-operative care are particularly fascinating because they delve into the complexities of managing delicate surgical procedures and optimizing healing."
"This is a great topic especially for me as a plastic surgery resident."
"I enjoyed learning about the skin graft techniques."
"I found the management of the circulatory goals to be paticularly interesting."

Anaesthesia in War|1.comment: "The course provided realistic scenarios and practical strategies that can be applied in emergency and battlefield medicine."

Anaesthesia in War|2.comment: "The course clearly explains how to adapt anaesthetic techniques, airway management and pain control to environments with limited equipment, while maintaining patient safety. The focus on real-world scenarios and decision-making in austere conditions was especially valuable."

Anaesthesia in War|3.comment: "An excellent course, well presented, incredibly useful, lots of new info and ideas - from someone who's completed 16 ICRC field missions in surgery hospitals over decades. Thanks."

Anaesthesia in War|4.comment: "Thank you for the well-organized anesthesia course. It was informative, clinically relevant, and helpful for understanding real-world perioperative management."

Anaesthesia in War|6.comment: "Thank-you very much! Excellent presentation! Detailed! Realistic!"

Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.course: Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal Birth After Caesarean Delivery
Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.comment: "I found the course particularly interesting in how it explained the anaesthetic management of VBAC in a clear and practical way. The discussion on the use of neuraxial analgesia and its safety in VBAC patients was very insightful, as it challenged some common misconceptions and highlighted its benefits in labour management."

Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.course: Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal Birth After Caesarean Delivery
Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.comment: "The most interesting aspect of this course was the explanation of anaesthetic management during VBAC. I particularly found the use of epidural analgesia in labour very interesting, as it provides pain relief and allows quick conversion to general anaesthesia in case of emergency."

Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.course: Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal Birth After Caesarean Delivery
Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.comment: "The most interesting parts of the course were the intrapartal recommendations and management parts."

Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.course: Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal Birth After Caesarean Delivery
Anaesthetic Considerations for Vaginal B.comment: "I learned new information that I did not know about."

Appendicitis|1.comment: "Practical demonstration of appendectomy using everyday items and objects, giving students an idea of what to expect in the operating room."

Appendicitis|2.comment: "I loved the case scenario and the videos explaining from the most basic of laparoscopic."

Appendicitis|4.comment: "Loved the video demonstration. It was overall perfect."

Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.course: Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Locorégionale Echoguidée en toute Sécurité
Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.comment: "Les étapes à suivre, bien énumérées dans leur succession, sont très nécessaires pour un débutant. Le fait d'avoir des ateliers pratiques avec de petites démonstrations afin de fixer notre apprentissage m'a vraiment facilité la compréhension."

Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.course: Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Locorégionale Echoguidée en toute Sécurité
Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.comment: "Mes remerciements au docteur pour ce cours, qui va nous permettre, en tant que résidents en anesthésie-réanimation, d'améliorer nos pratiques. Merci infiniment."

Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.course: Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Locorégionale Echoguidée en toute Sécurité
Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.comment: "Jai été intéressé par ce cours qui est bien résumé mais qui aborde tous les aspects loco régionaux sous Échographie."

Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.course: Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Locorégionale Echoguidée en toute Sécurité
Apprendre et Transmettre lAnesthésie Loc.comment: "Tous les aspects du cours sont très intéressants pour moi. Merci beaucoup pour le formateur."

Basic Burn Management|1.comment: "I enjoyed the video lecture as it's easier to go through than reading alone."

Basic Burn Management|2.comment: "I enjoyed learning about the types of burns and how to measure the burns area."

Basic Burn Management|3.comment: "Great course, and great teacher. It covered almost all the basic stratgies to manage burn patients."

Basic Burn Management|4.comment: "This was a really good course. Very helpful."

Basic Caesarean Section|1.comment: "The most interesting aspects were the surgical techniques for different uterine incisions, the rapid decision-making protocols for emergency cases, and the advancements in postoperative recovery to improve maternal health.".

Basic Caesarean Section|2.comment: "I liked the clear explanation of key concepts and the practical approach used to understand clinical scenarios."

Basic Caesarean Section|3.comment: "I liked the lecture, the videos showing live procedures, and the overall structure of course."

Basic Principles of Wound Management|1.comment: "I found the mechanisms of action of drugs to be the most interesting aspect of this course. I was also particularly interested in learning about drug indications beyond their primary use, such as Topiramate for migraine prevention and amphetamines for ADHD and narcolepsy. Additionally, studying adverse effects and contraindications was valuable because it reinforces safe prescribing and patient-centered care."

Basic Principles of Wound Management|2.comment: "One of the most interesting aspects of the course was learning about the triage system and how it helps prioritize patient care in high-pressure situations. Understanding how to quickly assess and categorize injuries using systems like START gave me a clear picture of how critical thinking and rapid decision-making are applied in real-life emergencies. I also found the team coordination and role assignment during mass casualty incidents particularly fascinating. Additionally, the integration of mental health support for both victims and responders was a powerful reminder of the emotional impact of disasters."

Basic Principles of Wound Management|3.comment: "I found the sections on wound assessment and classification particularly interesting, as they provided a structured approach to understanding different types of wounds and their healing stages. The discussions on wound dressings and their selection based on exudate levels and wound type were also very engaging, as they helped me understand how to choose the right treatment for optimal healing. Additionally, learning about infection control in wound care was insightful, as it emphasized the importance of preventing complications while promoting healing."

Basic Principles of Wound Management|4.comment: "The most interesting aspect of the course for me was the management and treatment of wounds. I found it very informative to learn the different types of wounds, appropriate dressing selection and proper techniques to promote faster healing and prevent infection."

Basic Principles of Wound Management|5.comment: "The part I found most interesting was the types of wound debridements , it introduced me to many wound debridements that I was not familiar with, and it was very enlightening."

Blast Injuries|1.comment: "“I found most interesting the integration of blast physics with clinical care, especially how understanding overpressure waves directly explains the injury patterns we see in the lungs, bowel, and ear.”."

Blast Injuries|2.comment: "Thoroughly enjoyable - a former Royal Navy Medic, we did learn about blast injuries but this really added greater depth of understanding to injuries, initial treatment and follow up treatment."

Blast Injuries|3.comment: "Truly an amazing intermediate course. With once basic foundation, one can truly appreciate this course and be better prepared to implement same in field of operation. Awesome!"

Blast Injuries|4.comment: "I found the information about acute management of blast injury extremely interesting."

Blast Injuries|5.comment: "I love this course, it is really insightful."

Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.course: Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric Anaesthesia
Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.comment: "Nice course and not too long. I enjoyed the test at the end, thanks."

Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.course: Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric Anaesthesia
Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.comment: "As a medical student, I found the course overall to be very interesting."

Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.course: Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric Anaesthesia
Blood Sparing Techniques in Paediatric A.comment: "I encourage you to take advantage of opportunities like this course for employment and betterment."

Brain Death|1.comment: "I liked the interactive teaching method of this brain death course."

Brain Death|2.comment: "This course gave me very new information that enhanced my knowledge."

Brain Death|3.comment: "I liked learning about the clinical details, the ethical dilemmas and legal aspects."

Brain Death|4.comment: "I found this course great. Very informative and interesting topic! Excellent Presentation!"

Breast Cancer Surgery Course|1.comment: "I liked the set up and system of presentations of the modules. These helped me to appreciate the indications and factors to consider for primary surgery in breast cancer. Also, understanding the various surgical options for breast itself, the options for surgical management of the axilla, and appreciation of the complications of breast surgery and the prevention and post-op management."

Breast Cancer Surgery Course|2.comment: "Very good course. I can say any postgraduate candidate will benefit from it very well."

Breast Cancer Surgery Course|3.comment: "This course its a great and focuses on very advanced technology to save lives."

Breast Cancer Surgery Course|4.comment: "This course gives the clear guidelines for cancer breast treatment."

Breast Reconstruction|1.comment: "I found the detailed comparison between subpectoral and prepectoral implant-based reconstruction, as well as the in-depth discussion of autologous flap options, particularly interesting. The step-by-step surgical techniques, anatomical considerations, and management of complications provided a comprehensive understanding that was both practical and clinically relevant."

Breast Reconstruction|2.comment: "A complex topic that is well-explained in a very organized manner."

Breast Reconstruction|3.comment: "Overall, the course provided valuable content and practical insights. I appreciated the case-based discussions and step-by-step demonstrations. The material was relevant to my professional practice.""

Breast Reconstruction|4.comment: "I have learnt new things. The most interesting part for me was learning about the different types of reconstructive surgery."

Burn Reconstruction|1.comment: "I liked learning about the clinical decision-making in burn reconstruction, especially how depth, biomechanics, and tissue quality guide the choice between grafts, local flaps, and free tissue transfer."

Burn Reconstruction|2.comment: "I especially enjoyed the hands-on demonstrations and opportunities to practice skills."

Burn Reconstruction|3.comment: "I found this course great for post graduates."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|1.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|1.comment: "Currently I am working as a nurse in Rehabilitative center in Thailand, we have to provide rehabilitative and intermediate nursing care for severely burn patients (60%) after discharged. Calories calculation in this course is the most interesting part for me. The topic, content and objective are closely aligned with my current job."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|2.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|2.comment: "I found the most interesting aspects of this course to be the comprehensive approach to burn patient care. The discussions on the hypermetabolic response and the importance of nutrition were particularly valuable, as they highlighted the systemic impact of burns beyond the skin. I also enjoyed learning about the complexity of pain mechanisms in burn patients and how multidisciplinary strategies can improve both survival and quality of life."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|3.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|3.comment: "The aspect of the course that I found most interesting was the lecture delivered by Nurse Susan Smith. It was amazing. I learned a lot about burns, wound healing, and how to help a patient overcome the different types of pain they experience. and the nutritional requirements for quick wound healing."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|4.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|4.comment: "I am an advanced life support paramedic from Zambia and we never learnt burns to this depth, this has been very helpful."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|5.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|5.comment: "The most interesting part of this course is pain management being considered in various aspects of the patient beyond the wound/burn site. Most of the health care providers in LMIC focus on the wound than the patient as a whole which greatly delays wound healing, an emotional damage and other psychological challenges."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|6.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|6.comment: "I liked the approach of teaching and the pace. This has helped me appreciate the concepts around the appropriate management of pain, as this is an essential component ensuring effective burn wound treatment and optimizes patient participation and comfort too. Also, this has further helped me appreciate the fact that post operative dressings must be secure to protect skin grafts and finally, the aspect of nutritional requirements in supporting healing must always be considered."

Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|7.course: Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management
Burns: Wound Care and Pain Management|7.comment: "Thank you very much for making this course available. Burns is such a common and destructive trauma in my country, and it is not taught in depth at medical and nursing school."

Burns|1.comment: "What I found most interesting was the integration of acute management, surgical decision-making, and long-term rehabilitation. It really highlighted how multidisciplinary burn care has to be."

Burns|2.comment: "I liked the lectures, the videos presented by the director, and the content."

Burns|3.comment: "I enjoyed learning about the hydration of burn victims and the value of topical use of antibiotics."

Burns|4.comment: "I found the flexibility of learning at my own pace and the variety of interactive online resources valuable."

Burns|5.comment: "The information is well summarized and to the point."

Burns|6.comment: "The most important aspect of this course is that it provides the basic concepts of burns management in the early stges and the treatment of all the stages of burns at the primary level."

C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.course: C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle Fractures
C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.comment: "I enjoyed  learning how intraoperative imaging directly affects surgical outcomes especially in procedures like ankle fracture fixation. The use of the Mortise View to assess joint alignment and implant positioning was fascinating. I also appreciated the practical knowledge on positioning the patient and the C-Arm, which are vital skills in the theatre setting. These insights will definitely help me support the surgical team more effectively during orthopedic cases."

C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.course: C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle Fractures
C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.comment: "The most interesting aspect of this course was learning how to use the C-Arm for real-time imaging during ankle fracture surgeries. I found it fascinating to see how intraoperative imaging improves the accuracy of fracture reduction and implant placement. Understanding the step-by-step positioning of the C-Arm and safety measures for both the patient and surgical team was particularly engaging."

C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.course: C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle Fractures
C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.comment: "Amazing course. I was able to appreciate the importance of intraoperative imaging in the surgical management of ankle fractures. I am going to ensure I request for one in my area of operation."

C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.course: C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle Fractures
C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.comment: "The imaging showing the radiographs and the labelling made it clear and easy to understand why certain views are used and what proper alignment should look like."

C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.course: C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle Fractures
C-Arm Intraoperative Imaging for Ankle F.comment: "This is an excellent and well put together course."

CVAD Complications Prevention and Manage.comment: "I found the sections on central venous access devices (CVADs), their complications, and infection prevention strategies most interesting. The practical focus on maintaining catheter patency, recognising early warning signs of complications, and applying evidence-based interventions was particularly engaging."

"I found the modules on CVAD complications, infection prevention, and maintaining catheter patency particularly engaging. The practical focus on real-world scenarios, such as recognizing air embolism risks and managing occlusions, helped me connect theory to clinical practice. I also appreciated the clear explanations of colonisation routes and best-practice assessment strategies."

"The videos were consice, engaging, and easy to follow, and I found the “test yourself” sections particularly helpful as they allowed me to check my understanding and confirm that I had grasped the key concepts."

"The most engaging aspects were the practical, real-world scenarios and case studies that linked theory to clinical practice. I also appreciated the clear explanations of CVAD complications and infection prevention strategies, which were highly relevant to professional practice."
"I really enjoyed this online course, because it was well planned and layed out well. it was very easy for me to follow."
"I learned a lot of new things and terms that I wasnt really sure about before."
"Prevention of complications was the most interesting part of this course. To know how we can prevent a specific complication and in what way."

Cardiac Trauma|2.comment: "An amazing course with the true potential of granting confidence in recognizing when to perform sternotomy, thoracotomy, pulmonary tractotomy and other related cardiothoracic surgical interventions in cardiac trauma. Awesome indeed."

Cardiac Trauma|4.comment: "This course provided an excellent foundation in trauma decision-making and surgical priorities. The clinical scenarios were realistic and thought-provoking."

Cardiac Trauma|5.comment: "I liked it that it is scenario based and progressive with time."

Cardiac Trauma|7.comment: "I really liked that this course equipped me with critical thinking and clincial knowledge."

Central Venous Access Devices CVADs|1.comment: "One of the most interesting aspects of this course was learning about the clinical indications and techniques for central venous access. I found it especially valuable to understand the anatomical landmarks, the use of ultrasound guidance, and the importance of aseptic technique to prevent infections. It was also very engaging to study the potential complications and how to manage them, which emphasized the importance of precision and safety in clinical practice."

Central Venous Access Devices CVADs|2.comment: "The course was simple and the content was easy to understand. I liked that after each question, the correct answer with the reference was there."

Central Venous Access Devices CVADs|3.comment: "I enjoyed learning about the types of CVAD, area for insertion, maintenance and how to remove it."

Chemical and Radiation Injuries|1.comment: "I liked the clear comparison between different types of chemical and radiological agents, their mechanisms, and characteristic symptoms and appreciated the detailed discussion of specific antidotes. I found the real-world clinical cases from Syria, Japan, and Goiânia especially engaging, as they connected theory with practice. Finally, the emphasis on hospital and community preparedness reinforced the importance of coordination and planning in disaster response."

Chemical and Radiation Injuries|2.comment: "I feel very glad that I have chosen this course."

Chemical and Radiation Injuries|4.comment: "All the visual media was perfect to me."

Chest Wall Reconstruction|1.comment: "Great platform. Thanks for oppurtunity. Good idea and inspiration for me to do something in this format for younger generation colleagues in my home country Ukraine. When we give more we absolutely will return more!"

Chest Wall Reconstruction|2.comment: "This course helped me in gaining a clear framework for the principles of chest wall reconstruction: restoring function, protecting vital organs, achieving durable coverage, and preserving respiratory mechanics."

Chest Wall Reconstruction|5.comment: "I liked this course because it take very few hours to accomplish it and it's interesting."

Cleft Lip and Palate|1.comment: "The explanations of the different types of repairs with the diagrams was very helpful. Especially when the prof marked out on the images how he would mark the patient prior to cutting."

Cleft Lip and Palate|2.comment: "A well worded lecture with emphasis on proper techniques, their advantages and disadvantages. Real case depictions also helped."

Cleft Lip and Palate|3.comment: "I enjoyed the explanations as to why there may be lip deformities post surgery, and why fistulae at the incisive foramen are hard to heal."

Cleft Lip and Palate|4.comment: "The course is very useful and it's time to apply it to make one smile at a time in as many patients as possible."

Cleft Lip and Palate|5.comment: "This course is truly helpful in lower resource countries."

Cleft Lip and Palate|6.comment: "The unilateral cleft lip repair lecture was so enriching and well explained."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|1.comment: "Overall, the course was very informative and well-structured. I appreciated the practical examples and clear explanations."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|2.comment: "This course has really helped me in knowing the causes and as I will be seeing and transferring patients I will have an understanding of what is going on with my patients."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|3.comment: "I liked the pace and the need for critical thinking needed for the understanding of the required concepts. Also, the knowledge of the sequence in colon cancer from adenoma to carcinoma. Finally, I liked the aspect of the prognosis of colon cancer and the post operative together with polypectomy surveillance."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|4.comment: "I found most interesting the surgical management of colonic cancer and screening program."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|5.comment: "I liked the good correlation between basic sciences and management."

Colon Cancer Surgery Course|6.comment: "All parts of this course are interesting."

Common Intraoperative Problems|1.comment: "The teaching aspect and also the interactive session did help me to appreciate the aspects around resources that may be helpful in the event of an emergency in the operating room. Also, I have better insight now around common problems and potential solutions arising from patients, equipment, personnel and related conditions."

Common Intraoperative Problems|2.comment: "I liked the management of most occurring intraoperative problems and their awareness. All parts of the course are really interesting."

Common Intraoperative Problems|3.comment: "I found most interesting the part where he explained that failed equipments are often overlooked until it’s too late such as an insecure IV line."

Common Intraoperative Problems|4.comment: "Everything was interesting. The structure, and the approach to the intraoperative issues were simple, clear and applicable."

Common Intraoperative Problems|5.comment: "Very very good and relevant course for surgery. Many thanks to SURGhub and ReSurge International."

Common Intraoperative Problems|6.comment: "I found it most interesting how teamwork, communication, and small clinical details can make a big differences on patients safety."

Interactive components, such as simulations or role-play, which help reinforce communication and critical thinking skills. Coverage of patient safety and error prevention strategies. Discussions on handling ethical dilemmas and vulnerable populations, which are highly relevant to real-world practice."

"It is a good course, I learned many things from it."

"The various case scenarios were helpful in providing context and visualization of the content in action."
"I will use the information acquired in this course ."

Difficult Airway Algorithm 2023|1.comment: "I love the swift pace of the course, it is great and gave me a framework that difficult airway algorithm hinges on the aspect of getting a difficult ventilation and intubation problem and attempting awake intubation is best. Preparation is key in that sense and also I liked how I get to be refreshed by the flowcharts."

Difficult Airway Algorithm 2023|3.comment: "The layout is what I found most interesting."

Difficult Airway Algorithm 2023|4.comment: "The most interesting aspects of this course were the in-depth exploration of healthcare systems and their impact on patient care, the practical case studies that provided real-world applications, and the emphasis on the evolving trends in healthcare management. I particularly enjoyed learning about the integration of technology in healthcare delivery, as well as strategies for improving organizational efficiency and patient outcomes. The course also offered valuable insights into policy-making and the role of leadership in shaping the healthcare landscape."

Difficult Airway Algorithm 2023|5.comment: "For Anaesthesiologists this topic is the most important."

Difficult Airway Algorithm 2023|6.comment: "I enjoyed the topics on preoperative discussions with the team, documentation of airway concerns, and clearly informing recovery staff and parents (as appropriate) are crucial parts of safe care. Also that any difficult airway event should be carefully documented and communicated for future care planning."

Difficult Caesarean Section|1.comment: "I liked the course as I am a scrub nurse in a maternity theatre. Even though I'm a scrub nurse this course helps me to anticipate my own actions and steps and help the surgeons to safely deliver while minimising risks. This bite size course is not heavy to even learn when in breaks on shift."

Difficult Caesarean Section|2.comment: "I found every aspect of the course very interesting."

Difficult Caesarean Section|3.comment: "An awesome course with real-time benefit to impactful practice."

Drug Errors in Anesthesia 2023|4.comment: "The material was presented in an easy to understand way. The navigation of the software was easy to use."

Drug Errors in Anesthesia 2023|1.comment: "I enjoyed learning about the types of common ADE and how it impacts the life of patients and can be fatal in some cases if not recognized in a timely manner. Also the importance in adhering to prescribed protocol and vigilance to ensure drug errors are preventable."

Drug Errors in Anesthesia 2023|2.comment: "I liked learning about the management strategies, and that is because of their permeability. I have a personal goal to come up with a nearly impermeable strategy."

Drug Errors in Anesthesia 2023|3.comment: "I liked the topic on incorrect dosing or drug selection. For example, giving too much or too little of an anesthetic agent, or administering the wrong medication."

ED Thoracotomy|1.comment: "The course was informative and it covers most aspects of ED thoracotomy and challenges faced. Overall the course was great and effort was made to make this happen. Many thanks to the team."

ED Thoracotomy|4.comment: "I found the real world experience and examples of the course providers to be particularly valuable."

ED Thoracotomy|3.comment: "Congratulations on making this kind of free courses! This is the right way to go!"

ED Thoracotomy|6.comment: "I found the 'who' section gives a nice pverview of the evidence to be particularly valuable."

ED Thoracotomy|9.comment: "I found the importance of clinical reasoning they show to be particularly valuable."

Ear Reconstruction|5.comment: "I liked how real operating room cases were shown which was extremely helpful to understand the topic, and that the prof. showed different techniques in ear reconstruction."

Ectopic Pregnancy|1.comment: "This course must be given as a reminder for all medical staff in a planned manner, as it is very critical."

Ectopic Pregnancy|2.comment: "I loved this course because its focus on clinical aspects. Highly relevant to the routine medical practices. The knowledge gained here can be directly used in routine basis life saving activities."

Ectopic Pregnancy|3.comment: "Every topic is explained clearly and concisely, making it easy to apply the knowledge and improve skills for career success."

Ectopic Pregnancy|4.comment: "Ive enjoyed the course, the content accuracy was above expectations and the delivery was also on point. This is definitely going to make an impact in my healthcare provision!"

Essential Burn Care EBC|1.comment: "A well-structured, evidence-based course that highlights the critical nature of holistic burn care from a global health perspective."

Essential Burn Care EBC|2.comment: "I found this course on burn care extremely engaging because it covered the comprehensive management of patients, including physical, nutritional, and psychological aspects."

Essential Burn Care EBC|3.comment: "The initial assessment and triage of burn injuries was particularly interesting as it highlighted the importance of early intervention in improving outcomes. The section on fluid resuscitation and wound management was very informative, especially how tailored care plans are developed based on burn severity and depth."

Essential Burn Care EBC|4.comment: "Thank you for making this course possible. I wish it improves the care of burn patients everywhere."

Essential Burn Care EBC|5.comment: "I found the sections on fluid resuscitation, burn assessment, and rehabilitation most interesting. Learning about the Rule of Palm, TBSA calculation, and anti-contracture positioning was very practical and useful for real-life patient care."

Essential Burn Care EBC|6.comment: "I found the sections on chemical and electrical burns particularly engaging, especially the emphasis on underlying pathophysiology and the differences between pediatric and adult burn management."

Microsurgery and Workhorse Flaps|1.comment: "The knowledge, concepts, awareness, skills and relevance of all things which I have learned in this course were superb. I will use the information acquired in this course in my daily practice."

Microsurgery and Workhorse Flaps|2.comment: "I liked the pace of the presentation and the aspect of the different types of harvested grafts and their preferable points of use. Also, the complications to donor and recipient's site and actions needed to take in each scenario. Finally, the Mathes and Nahai classification refresher for me was interesting."

Microsurgery and Workhorse Flaps|3.comment: "I actually recommended this video to people at work, especially to staff that closely work with reconstructive plastic surgeries. Very helpful for me as I deal with orthopaedic oncology cases that usually need reconstructive surgery."

Microsurgery and Workhorse Flaps|4.comment: "I really appreciate that the course briefly summarized the most commonly used workhorse flaps in a descriptive manner."

Obstetric Trauma|1.comment: "I found the section on assessing and managing trauma in pregnant women the most interesting. It clearly explained how physiological changes in pregnancy affect trauma response and guided me on how to prioritize care to improve both maternal and fetal outcomes."

Obstetric Trauma|2.comment: "I enjoyed learning about trauma and physical injuries and how they can affect the baby and mother - but before it affects them what I can do to save both of them. I loved the way this courses is about saving the lives of two people."

Obstetric Trauma|3.comment: "The feedback and explanations after the post-course assessment were an amazing added benefit."

Obstetric Trauma|4.comment: "What I found most interesting was the unique overlap between maternal and fetal physiology in trauma management: while the pregnant mother is the first priority, properly treating her also leads to the best outcomes for the fetus."

Obstetric Trauma|5.comment: "The aspects I found most interesting were the practical applications and case-based scenarios. I appreciated how the course linked theoretical concepts to real-life clinical situations, particularly in emergency and critical care settings. The interactive modules and step-by-step explanations of procedures helped me understand complex topics more effectively."

Perioperative Nursing E-Learning Foundat.comment: "The most interesting aspects of this course were learning how waste in healthcare affects efficiency and patient care, and seeing practical ways to create a productive operating theatre. Perioperative Nursing E-Learning Foundat.course: Perioperative Nursing E-Learning Foundational Programme (PeN Programme)

Pulse Oximetry in the context of COVID-1.comment: "This course is the best and easy to learn."

Pulse Oximetry|1.comment: "I liked learning in depth EXACTLY what the pulse oximeter does, its vital importance in diagnosis, and interpreting readings / measurements. This was excellent!"

Pulse Oximetry|2.comment: "This course's information is very useful for us in developing countries, we are very privileged to access it online. Thank you very much."

Pulse Oximetry|3.comment: "Thank you for this course. I really appreciate it and I acquired so much from this course."

Pulse Oximetry|4.comment: "I thought it was very interactive and explained concepts thoroughly!"

Pulse Oximetry|5.comment: "The detailed checklist of what could be the reason for a patient to desaturate in the OT was very helpful."

Pulse Oximetry|6.comment: "I liked the practical applications as well as the multiple choice quizzes along the way."

Surgical Instrument Testing and Inspecti.comment: "I found the sections on visual inspection and functional testing of surgical instruments the most interesting, especially learning how to identify defects, check alignment, tension, and movement. These practical, real-world examples helped me better understand how proper inspection improves patient safety and the reliability of surgical procedures."

"I found the hands-on practical testing of surgical instruments most interesting because it gave me a clear understanding of how crucial maintenance and precision are in ensuring patient safety and successful surgical outcomes. Learning about different testing materials and techniques also deepened my appreciation of the technical skills required in the operating theatre.”
"This is an astounding course for me. Very much engaging and interesting too. Awesome!"
"I like the idea of graphics and real pictures of instruments being displayed. It makes the learning more interesting and eases the absorption of information."
"I learned more about the handling of surgical instruments from a perspective that we as physicians sometimes take for granted, but that is very important for the proper recovery of our patients."

Suture Technique|1.comment: "I found several aspects of this course particularly interesting and valuable. The detailed explanation of different types of sutures helped me understand their specific indications and appropriate uses. The step-by-step demonstration of various suturing techniques, was very helpful in visualizing the practical application. Learning about the selection of sutures based on tissue type and wound condition enhanced my clinical reasoning. Finally, the emphasis on preventing infection and ensuring optimal wound healing through proper technique and suture choice was very insightful for my future medical practice."

Suture Technique|2.comment: "The course was really good and informative. I found it especially interesting during the video about suturing — it was very clear and easy to understand. The demonstration helped me learn the technique step by step, and it kept me engaged throughout. Overall, it's a great learning experience for anyone in the medical field."

Suture Technique|3.comment: "I found the hands-on procedural demonstrations and interactive case discussions the most interesting parts of the course. Seeing surgical techniques applied in real-life scenarios gave me a deeper appreciation of surgical precision and decision-making. I also enjoyed learning about the rationale behind different surgical approaches and the use of specific instruments or sutures in various tissues. It made the theoretical concepts come alive and reinforced the critical thinking required in surgery."

Suture Technique|4.comment: "Overall, the course was very informative and practical. I appreciated the hands-on demonstrations. Adding more real-life scenarios and interactive quizzes could make it even better."

Suture Technique|5.comment: "The most onteresting aspects of the course were the well documented and organized slides in the presentation. They contained accurate information that makes efficient in comprehending the concepts. Thank you!"

Suture Technique|6.comment: "One of the most interesting aspects of this course was learning about different types of sutures and their specific clinical applications. Understanding the differences between absorbable vs. non-absorbable, monofilament vs. multifilament, and knowing when to use each type in various surgical scenarios—such as infected wounds, vascular repair, or subcutaneous closure—was both practical and insightful. These concepts are directly applicable in clinical settings and enhance surgical decision-making skills."

Tranexamic Acid|1.comment: "The most interesting aspect of this online course was learning about tranexamic acid, especially its mechanism of action in controlling bleeding and its wide range of clinical applications such as trauma, surgery, and obstetric hemorrhage. I also found it valuable to understand when it should and should not be used in different clinical situations.”

Tranexamic Acid|2.comment: "This was a brilliant course. I enjoyed it very much and appreciate now how important it is."

Tranexamic Acid|3.comment: "ALL the course was relevant.I mostly enjoyed knowing the different uses of TXA and the side effects of that product as well."

Tranexamic Acid|5.comment: "I have learnt that tranexamic acid helps to reduce systemic inflammatory response."

Transversus Abdominis Plane Block|1.comment: "I learned the anatomy of the abdominal wall and the nerve innervation makes it easy to grasp the concept of why we use the blocks and how to adequately perform them."

Transversus Abdominis Plane Block|2.comment: "I am very grateful for this course. Thank you."

Transversus Abdominis Plane Block|3.comment: "This course helped me to improve skills and knowledge in regional anaesthesia."

Transversus Abdominis Plane Block|4.comment: "The type and quality of the information is very adequate."

Triage & Resuscitation|1.comment: "I found the clinical explanations, the practical steps, and the clear presentation of the topics most interesting. The course provided valuable and applicable knowledge that will help me in my clinical practice."

Triage & Resuscitation|2.comment: "The course was very helpful and the case based aproach to identifying fatal patients was helpful in knowing how to prioritize care in stressful and resource scarsce situations i.e mass casualties."

Triage & Resuscitation|3.comment: "I found the practical approach to trauma assessment and management most interesting, especially the clear prioritization during triage and the step-by-step handling of critical situations like airway compromise and shock."

Triage & Resuscitation|4.comment: "I'm a nurse and I'm very happy with this course and would want to learn more on triage adult and peaditric resuscitation and become more competent in performing procedures."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|1.comment: "La manera en que se presenta la información es muy útil para cualquier estudiante que aún no ha cursado técnicas quirúrgicas, ya que ofrece una visión clara y accesible de las técnicas de sutura y puntos."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|2.comment: "El curso no solo explica la técnica de sutura, sino que también enseña el porqué, para qué sirve, cuándo no es la opción adecuada y cómo elegir la más conveniente para cada paciente."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|3.comment: "Es muy interesante la forma en que se presenta el contenido en video, con un resumen escrito al pie de la pantalla mientras el video está activo. Esta combinación facilita la atención y permite seguir el curso sin perder el hilo."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|4.comment: "La información es clara, precisa y el tiempo asignado para completar el curso y sus actividades es el adecuado."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|5.comment: "El curso es conciso, pero está muy bien detallado. Presenta la información de forma concreta y va directo al punto."

Técnica de Suturas y Puntos|6.comment: "El curso estuvo bien estructurado e informativo."

template course (testing)|2.comment: "Great short course, I wish I had known of this app sooner."

template course (testing)|3.comment: "Great short course, I wish I had known of this app sooner."
